/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsocial_robot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libsocial_robot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/social_robot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/social_robot_interfaces/msg/detail/tsp_command__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/social_robot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/social_robot_interfaces/srv/detail/tours__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/karan/ros2_humble/install/geometry_msgs/lib:/home/karan/ros2_humble/install/std_msgs/lib:/home/karan/ros2_humble/install/builtin_interfaces/lib:/home/karan/ros2_humble/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib:/home/karan/ros2_humble/install/rcutils/lib: /home/karan/ros2_humble/install/geometry_msgs/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /home/karan/ros2_humble/install/std_msgs/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /home/karan/ros2_humble/install/builtin_interfaces/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /home/karan/ros2_humble/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /home/karan/ros2_humble/install/rcutils/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
